completeness.reasoning: Core single-cell genomics methods extensively demonstrated in relevant notebooks that import and use scanpy functions. Built-in dataset functions provide readily available sample data. Clear README and pyproject.toml manifest.

clarity.reasoning: Comprehensive docstrings with parameter types, detailed explanations, and literature references. No hardcoded paths. Well-documented configuration via function parameters.

modularity.reasoning: Pure Python library with clean modular structure. Functions can be imported and used independently. No tight coupling or custom compilation requirements.

reproducibility.reasoning: All dependencies available on PyPI. Standard pyproject.toml packaging. No SSH dependencies or compilation requirements. Well-maintained scientific Python package.

executability.reasoning: Multiple comprehensive demos exist that demonstrate the complete single-cell genomics workflow using scanpy's core methods. Built-in dataset functions provide readily available data. Runs on CPU in reasonable time.

recommendations: The scanpy repository is excellent for agent conversion - it provides comprehensive single-cell genomics functionality with built-in datasets and extensive tutorial notebooks that demonstrate the complete workflow
